mot-purpose: the work that matters most to me is helping others because everyone needs help to get things done — even if they can do the thing themselves, sometimes it's just a wingman that gets it across the line
win1: Convert my 14thA citizenship to American National Citizenship
win2: Regenerate my income; I have worked pro-bono for the past year and even this RPS gig is at 1/2 my earnings rate.

wins-why: I need to get out from under the obligations of 14thA Citizenship; I have the way to do it, especially if I use KL, though he is expensive.  I need an income for freedom of movement and to give me options. I am happier in New York than in Ireland; that's where I want to be.
